name: The Ultimate Caramel Chocolate Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
Mix pecans, sugar, and margarine. Press onto the bottom and sides of a 9-inch pie plate. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes or until lightly browned. Cool.
Melt caramels with 1/4 cup milk in a heavy saucepan over low heat, stirring frequently until smooth. Pour over crust; sprinkle with pecans.
In another heavy saucepan, melt chocolate, 1/3 cup milk, powdered sugar, and vanilla over very low heat just until melted. Pour over caramel pecan filling, spreading to the edges of the pie.
Refrigerate. Serve with sweetened whipped cream if desired.
